title: Rogriss (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rogriss''' can refer to:
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]]—A career officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
*[[Asori Rogriss]]—The daughter of the aforementioned admiral.
*[[Terek Rogriss]]—The son of Admiral Rogriss.

{{Disambig}}
